ancient_tome.title: Obtain an Ancient Tome (Quark) from dungeon loot — use it to upgrade an enchantment above the vanilla cap

matrix_enchanting.title: Use Quark Matrix Enchanting to apply multiple enchantments in one session

subtitle.text: Ancient Tomes push enchantments one level past the cap. Sharpness V becomes VI. Efficiency V becomes VI. That is the ceiling.

description: CH.16 · ANCIENT TOMES
▸ Quark adds Ancient Tomes to dungeon loot.
An Ancient Tome applied to an item at its enchantment cap
increases that enchantment by 1 level beyond the vanilla maximum.
Sharpness V → Sharpness VI.
Efficiency V → Efficiency VI.
Protection IV → Protection V.
This is the enchanting ceiling. Ch16 is where you reach it.
◈ ANCIENT TOME MECHANICS
└ Source: rare dungeon loot (Strongholds, Bastions, Ancient Cities)
Also found in: Lootr structure chests (per-player loot reset)
└ Usage: apply to an item that already has the enchantment at cap
(the item must have Sharpness V before you can apply Sharpness Tome)
└ Stacking: each Tome upgrades one enchantment by one level
Multiple Tomes on same enchantment: does NOT stack past VI
└ Rarity: rare — collect over multiple dungeon runs
Budget Tomes carefully — use on Celestial Netherite only
◈ QUARK MATRIX ENCHANTING
└ Matrix Enchanting (Quark): allows applying enchantments
in a specific pattern on the enchanting table grid
└ Effect: more control over which enchants are offered
(reduces RNG by pattern manipulation)
└ Works alongside Immersive Enchanting for layered control
└ Most useful for: multi-enchant sessions where you want
specific combinations not typically offered together
◈ TARGET ENCHANTMENTS FOR ANCIENT TOMES
└ Sword: Sharpness VI (from V → VI)
└ Pickaxe: Efficiency VI (from V → VI)
└ Bow: Power VI (from V → VI)
└ Armor: Protection V (from IV → V) — only if tomes are surplus
(Protection V yields diminishing returns vs Celestial base armor)
▸ The knowledge in an Ancient Tome
was written before the current age.
The enchanting systems of previous civilizations
were slightly better than yours.
They left the knowledge in dungeons
for whoever came next.
That is you.
Use it.
▶ Obtain and use an Ancient Tome [check]
▶ Use Quark Matrix Enchanting for a multi-enchant session [check]
◇ Ancient Tomes are rare enough that you should plan which
three enchantments to upgrade first.
Recommended: Sharpness VI sword + Efficiency VI pick + Power VI bow.
These three cover the three primary activities of Ch17.
Save spare Tomes for any new weapons that drop in Ch17.
